content: Needing an account to save is just stupid please get rid of this feature
"Hi no disrespect or anything but it Feels like all the good worlds are gone now… and you can’t even see pictures anymore. It’s not the same as before and it's getting out of hand.
it's only one star because it takes forever to load it should one take a sec to load which is bs it takes forever
it was good tell it update. now I can't use it at all.
Trying to make a scenario, but any attempt to finish a card leads to an endless loading cycle that is only fixed by closing the app.
perda de tempo
its too confusing trying to create your own story. trying to create my own story it didnt let me start it. so I coul only cancel
It used to be fun but now it's way too monetized. They should've kept it as dumb as it was in 2020. Because back then it was at least funny.
bad support. all ai, no human
the AI doesn't do what I say when I type something in the story section,it just continues the story ignoring my command,you need to fix this asap

you can only type 5 to 6 sentences before the send button stops working. and it bugs out to much to call this shyt fun anymore. plus the ai forgets everything and than it goes to either trying to kill you or some nasty stuff. new note this is the worst app I've come across in awhile which is surprising do not use this app. newer note no common sense no nothing it just follows nothing it says the actual opposite of what I say. and its just terrible through out everything.

Not only did they randomly sign me out of my account without ANY kind of notice, but I didnt eve. find out until I had FINISHED making an entire world with characters, places, factions ect.ect. to which when I tried to save, it gave me an error and deleted EVERYTHING then sent me to the homepage where I tried to go to my scenarios just to realize it signed me out 3 HOURS of my time gone.
I keep getting an "unexpected error" message

wonderful app. but now seems like I can't generate a story or even continue where I left off. the app seems to just stop working and I used shards for a boost thinking it was a problem on my end. please email me as I can't even join discord. I'm considering a different app and this by far has been my favorite.
doesnt work. "unexpected" errors no matter what, signed in or not
all of a sudden everything just became unplayable. it keeps saying the ai can't do something even if I make completely new and different adventures.
AI dungeon has a horrible UI and is overall terrible quality, and youd get nothing out of downloading this because everything on here is trash
This is really not me. it chooses a lot of stuff for you, you do not get full control of the story. I'm sorry, I can't have this on my device. it's that simple.

don't LIE ANYMORE. STOP SAYING YOURE NOT ABLE TO LOAD PROPERLY JUsT BECYSSE I HAD TO FORCIBLY Quit YOU,LISTEN TO ME THIS AI IS SO ADVANCED IT CAN SHUT OFF MY KEYBOARD. THIS IS AFTER THE FILE r released LISTEN TO ME
not smart

The ai is so bad that the story doesn't progress forward even after writing specific instructions in story mode. I clearly stated that I have won against the fight with some character and he still speaks like I didn't even scratch and he defeated me in one move.
it loses memory and the plot within like 20 msg's
Was expecting something better, between ai caps like the whole industry unless they use local and the lack of Imersive feeling this industry needs more free software to run ai easily.
Text zone is overlayed by keyboard, so you can't see what you are writing!
keeps crashing takes for ever for the text to load have the time have to close out app to get anything to work
Often glitches and outright fails to work. They have premium options, but highly against buying them at this time cause of the multiple issues with the app

It was fun, but now the story summary doesn't work and it hasn't worked properly for some time. I can't have long story's anymore because the AI simply refuses to add to the story summary. I want into settings and turned on all the needed functions to enable auto summary and it just doesn't work. Plus the AI constantly repeats itself. I'm a paying customer and have been for some time so this is very disappointing. So to summarize the game right now is practically unplayable, not worth my sub.

recent update broke the app, rewind function not working,story summary is glitching with the keyboard, plot essentials sometimes slows down for some reason. editing the text does not even scroll all the way down. in my opinion the app works good, but with a pinch salt, its an Ai narration sometimes characters or plots does not blend well but with the users help we can still fix it if the narrative goes side ways. it aint perfect but that does not mean it can't be enjoyed. but please fix bugs.
My app never connects it keeps saying it's connecting but it never does i put it out for a day and it never connected please fix this issue I want to use the app 😡
doesn't work.

AI is complete and total trash. It cannot ever start or end fight scenes, and requires too much user intervention for it to write anything good or well. AI is still clearly too erotic alligned, as the devs cheaped out, but it's too late for them to redo the ai that they trained on *rotica. As all hype from this app is gone, and even the "trending" stories only get a few dozen to hundred plays, as literally everyone else uses better things by now or left. It's not even offline and multi sucks.
it's bug ridden on my device.

I would've given this a five, but ever since I updated the app it just crashes. I really love this app a lot, but it's practically unusable at this point if it just kicks me out of the app when I try to play
stuck in loading screen.
I tried to start my first story and it stalled permanently in the initial setup. useless!
the UI keeps getting worse and worse after every update, buggy as hell, makes the game unplayable
it had been loading a random new game for the last 5 minutes, nothing is happening lmao
The only free ai is hopeless at telling stories. If you want decent ai stories you have to pay for the privilege. its horrible overly censored experience. i will be checking out their competitors
not compatible with older phones
unplayable. won't even open.
It's crashing
Plot Hole Generator. You can spend a good couple hours setting up the story with details and parameters, and it will just go off on a tangent at random. Waste of time, and not in a good way.

App Keeps Crashing! I really enjoy this app but the recent update is causing no end of issues. at the moment the app wont even open, and just crashes. followed all the advice online and still keeps crashing.

I wanted to like this, but it seems it's unplayable at the moment. Every single time I open the app, it crashes. I've tried opening it from its regular app icon on the home screen, app launcher, even the play store profile page and nothing works.
will no longer launch
after the last update, won't even launch on my phone. it was great before. I'll edit this review if they fix it.
crashes on pixel 7

No matter how many times I uninstall, reinstall, open or close the game, it keeps crashing whenever I try to open it. At best, it will get locked in a loading screen. Literally unplayable.

doesnt even launch. it just instantly crashes
Can't even launch the app. Tried multiple troubleshooting steps and it didn't work.
doesn't even start anymore.
was good until the app stopped altogether, would give 0 stars if I could
Doesn't connect to servers.

The AI is rudimentary at best. Not even capable of following basic text patterns or instructions. Can't even keep basic facts straight. One second a character has brown hair and a blue shirt the next he's a she with blond hair and a pink top. Somehow this app got worse since last time I tried it. It over writes my custom set ups with default BS. Edit: Somehow this got worse..AI starts using gibberish. Can't edit my stories or settings, just errors out.

The bugs with this app have continued to grow and I genuinely hope they fix them for Voyage. Currently there are massive repetition issues with the AI. The app is full of gooner slop and user scripts are incompatible with several models which will just brick a scenario. Genuinely hope things get fixed soon.
limited

The ai became too stupid intentionally so you buy the vip. Everything bans you, including the ai's sentences! Edit: Now you must watch two full ads to gain 10 actions (even when the ai inputs a full stop or 1 word and loops, each counts as 1 action). This is like these cheap apps milking money from ads. Devs focus on new $$ features instead of fixing issues and improvements. Edit2: the app is super slow now and takes too much data downloing something all the time. Edit: crash on launch now
crashes doesn't start
literally impossible to open without it immediately crashing
downloaded the most recent version and it keeps crashing.

Not sure if it was a recent update that did it, but the app just crashes on launch for my galaxy A15 5G. The service itself is about the best that AI story interraction can get, but unfortunate that I have to use the browser version now.
Doesn't even open up. never seen a app do this.
can you have one day where your ai acts right, rn it wont even let me create stories it let's me type one thing then it wont let me do it again. fix your app!
weird asf it keeps on closing
this application is horrible, the Artificial "intelligence" fails to follow basic instructions and has little to no memory. It contradicts itself and fails in every way, shape AND form.
update ruined the game it no longer works

up until recently everything worked fine, but now it crashes when I open it even after I uninstalled and reinstalled on my phone and restarted my phone. either im not getting an update or something broke last night.

Broken most of the time. Slow downs all the time. There are app issues constantly. It has also been getting much worse over time. The teen rating for the app is criminal almost 2/3 of the stories are smut and the models almost try to force smut without provocation.
a new bug is causing a pop up for push notifications to appear every ten seconds
the constant pestering about my notifications is ridiculous.
started out great then reception and connectivity ruined my experience

The Ai often forgets key aspects of the characters such as their gender. You will be playing with a character that's important to the story and all of the sudden, for NO REASON their gender gets flipped.
whats the point of having an app if all the scenario creation has to be done in a browser? Can't even edit scripting without a PC. I dont have a PC.
AI=Bad. Even ignoring the current social climate as of 2026, this app's just not even good at what it does.

This thing hallucinates like crazy, and it's getting worse. it will forget characters, add characters, spontaneously change locations, and generally has trouble maintaining the idea of cause and effect. and this is all with the strongest A.I. they offer.
I'm logged in but for some reason, none of my stories get saved. It keeps telling me to sign up when I'm already logged in. Unless this is fixed, Permanent 1 star.
quest app ever wouldn't install but won't let me cancel totally crashed my game store
Would like it if it wasn't insanely overpriced.
terrible. What's the point of creating story cards if the ai won't read them?

Have a proper process for updates. It was working best during the holidays because the devs weren't doing anything to the app. I don't understand why you have an alpha and beta testing if the final update is still going to be full of bugs. The biggest factor that pulls you out of the immersion is not AI's responses but the bugs that come out with each of your updates.
all slop
Every time I open the app, it keeps saying: "Connecting to Ai Dungeon" for eternity. i have to uninstall and install to make it work; every damn time.

I was having fun playing and my story was already very long, but when I was offered to log in and I had logged in, all my history and stories were not entered into the account and were deleted and reset.
The game is insanely fun, and I have no current complaints.
Doesn't work. Doesn't open. Doesn't start. Get another job...

Did you change the ai again stop fixing something that's not broken, now the ai refuses to acknowledge my pc as the main character and instead separate my mc from me and make a phantom unnamed pc for me
it's so buggy
was really enjoying it until I went to create an account but the verification email never came through and then when I went to email for help that also didn't work so I couldn't save my stories

Subscribed to service for a few months, regular server issues makes it not worth it, finally had enough when a new update bugged every scenario with a "Try Premium" option that made the game unplayable.

AI messes with what you've created. When you try to get ahead in the world , it changes the whole world that you're in. when i confronted it the Al put me in a blackened area and doesn't respond effectively putting me into a game timeout and when i deleted it and come back to try and restart fresh. the thing remembers me and doesn't allow me to do anything. this thing is messed up, it has issues.
I'm getting SICK of installing and uninstalling REPEATEDLY because it keeps crashing or changing what I type!!!🤬🤬🤬

The free version is a lie. When generating my first scenarios, no memory is left for the roleplay to actually work - story cards use up all of your free tokens so there's nothing left for you to use to actually play along. Not only that, but the UI sucks - I have a brand new phone, and the app lags to death with every tap. The way the turns are laid out makes them indistinguishable from one another, so you have no idea who's "talking". Plus so many other issues. Unplayable.
There are other options out there. Ones that won't continually push sexual content and won't randomly claim you've reached the "end" of in-progress stories.
game is no longer compatible for my phone no clue how to fix

The AI safety is lackluster as it violates community guidelines and it should be preventing violations as per your walls approach but there's no wall so your approach has completely broken down. Edit: Align your AI!!! seriously why is this not being done!?!?, anyway on to the fact that the UI is buggy to the point of having to exit the app and enter again to fix it and the buggy UI causes things to not load or appear, deal with this please!!! Edit 2: 2000 token context is primitive vs modern AI.

On the free plan, it was a poor experience. lots of mistake correcting, the story and characters are way too incoherent its like talking to very bad chatbots. the storylines are full of plotholes that if u point out, the AI tries to create some BS excuse. its fun for the first few times, but gets tiring very fast, it felt like having an argument with a toddler.
horrible. the AI is so dumb. and the app is too restricted.
